title: Amanita
description: a minecraft mod that adds new flora! (and a sword)
body:
hai! this is my first minecraft mod (i don't know a lick of java but i tried).
here's what it adds:
- Chanterelles (a new mushroom that spawns in Taigas, Old Growth Spruce Taigas, Windswept Forests, Winswept Hiils, and Birch Forests. they are also cookable, they give you only 1.5 hunger)
- Wavy Caps (another new mushroom that spawns in Swamps, also cookable, gives the same hunger but also gives you nausea 3 for 15 seconds)
- Wavy Cap Stew (the same as normal mushroom stew, but gives nausea)
- Podaxis Pistillaris (woah third mushroom, spawns in Badlands, and Deserts, breaking it splits it into two, which are consumable, they give you 1 hunger each. shearable to get the block, (drops items which makes it unplaceable when broken))
- Split Podaxis (you get it, look up)
- Lilies (a new flower that spawns in all Savanna biomes, and Birch Forests, craftable into white dye)
- Clover Blocks (i added clovers to Minecraft cuz why not! they spawn in Plains, Forests, Birch Forests, and Old Growth Birch forests as a decorative block in patches. both clover blocks are mineable with a hoe)
- Big Clover Blocks (same as clover blocks, but big. they have a chance to appear in clumps with the clovers)
- Tall Clover Blocks (self explanatory. clovers but tall. spawn in clover patches.)
- The Venomshank (yes, like the roblox sword. craftable with two azalea leaves, two flowering azalea leaves, four big clover blocks, and a stone sword. it has 4 attack damage and 1 speed, but it inflicts poison 1 for 2 seconds, has a custom hitsound)
- Liberty Caps (a new mushroom that spawns in dark forests, you can make the potion of Auditory Hallucination from them, shearable to get the block (drops an item which makes it unplaceable when broken))
- Auditory Hallucination effect (a new effect that plays a list of sounds while the effect is active. that's it. could be used to mentally torture your foes >:3)
- A new painting!! (5x5, it's saint from rain world, drawn by me!! i also posted it on r/rainworld)
